title: Just 9 food parcels in 3 months while children starve
description: PROVINCIAL NEWS - In a written reply to a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PROVINCIAL NEWS - In a written reply to a parliamentary question, Social Development MEC, Bukiwe Fanta, confirmed that only two food parcels were distributed in January, none in February, and a mere seven in March.","html":"PROVINCIAL NEWS - In a written reply to a parliamentary question, Social Development MEC, Bukiwe Fanta, confirmed that only two food parcels were distributed in January, none in February, and a mere seven in March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This, despite the department allocating R6,1-million for food relief in the 2024/25 financial year.","html":"This, despite the department allocating R6,1-million for food relief in the 2024/25 financial year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Marlene Ewers, DA Shadow MEC for Social Development, says this is not a clerical oversight or administrative lag. \"It is a catastrophic failure of basic service delivery at a time of deepening food insecurity and rising hunger."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The department’s inability to distribute even ten parcels in a quarter must be seen in the context of the South African Human Rights Commission’s damning report into child malnutrition in the Eastern Cape.","html":"\"The department’s inability to distribute even ten parcels in a quarter must be seen in the context of the South African Human Rights Commission’s damning report into child malnutrition in the Eastern Cape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Commission confirmed that 1 087 children were diagnosed with severe acute malnutrition between April 2021 and March 2022, with 116 of those children dying,\" Ewers says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She says the same report revealed that the department forfeited R67-million in unspent Social Relief of Distress funds during that period. \"These funds could have gone directly towards food support for vulnerable families.\"","html":"She says the same report revealed that the department forfeited R67-million in unspent Social Relief of Distress funds during that period. \"These funds could have gone directly towards food support for vulnerable families.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The report also said that one in four children in the province is stunted - mainly due to malnutrition.","html":"The report also said that one in four children in the province is stunted - mainly due to malnutrition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"These figures expose a department out of touch with the scale of the crisis and paralysed by poor planning, limited coordination, and a complete absence of urgency."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"While officials cite support for nutrition centres and food gardens, the lived reality for many is starkly different.","html":"\"While officials cite support for nutrition centres and food gardens, the lived reality for many is starkly different."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Across communities, the need for immediate food aid remains unmet, and the systems meant to support the poor continue to collapse under weak leadership.\"","html":"\"Across communities, the need for immediate food aid remains unmet, and the systems meant to support the poor continue to collapse under weak leadership.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Even though the EC social development department admitted back in 2023 that it had not done enough to distribute food parcels, the situation has not improved.","html":"Even though the EC social development department admitted back in 2023 that it had not done enough to distribute food parcels, the situation has not improved."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A number of desperate mothers in the province have resorted to killing themselves and their children due to unbearable poverty."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ewers calls for an immediate audit of food parcel distribution and Social Relief of Distress fund utilisation across all districts and monthly reporting on relief delivery by district and municipality.","html":"Ewers calls for an immediate audit of food parcel distribution and Social Relief of Distress fund utilisation across all districts and monthly reporting on relief delivery by district and municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The Eastern Cape government must urgently implement the SAHRC’s recommendation to declare child malnutrition a provincial disaster.","html":"\"The Eastern Cape government must urgently implement the SAHRC’s recommendation to declare child malnutrition a provincial disaster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"In addition, a task team must be established to respond to the systemic failures in food aid distribution with immediate effect.\"","html":"\"In addition, a task team must be established to respond to the systemic failures in food aid distribution with immediate effect.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Ewers says the poorest families go hungry while food parcels sit undelivered and funds remain unspent."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Just 9 food parcels in 3 months while children starve
